variants.name: 列车惯性
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择[你在上个夜晚杀死的玩家数量+1]名玩家：他们死亡。
variants.otherNightReminder: Place all Momentum "Dead" tokens from characters in the middle of the Grimoire, plus one. The Momentum must choose that many players (they are not told how many they get to pick until they are put to sleep): all die. Any that do not die have their "Dead" tokens immediately removed.
